ham.subject: Transaction Alert: $200 Debit from Your Account
ham.body:
Hello,

A transaction of $200.00 was made from your account on 2026-04-14 at 10:32 AM.

Merchant: ABC Grocery
Location: 123 Main St, Springfield, IL

If you did not authorize this transaction, please contact us immediately at <URL> or call 1-800-123-4567.

Thank you for banking with us.

Sincerely,
Your Bank

spam.subject: Urgent: Immediate Action Required – Zoom Meeting Invite
spam.body:
Dear Customer,

We have detected an unusual activity on your account and require your immediate action. You have been invited to a Zoom meeting scheduled for May 20, 2026 at 3:00 PM UTC. Please click the link below to join the meeting and verify your account.

<URL>

For security reasons, we ask that you verify your identity by visiting the following link:
<URL>

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Sincerely,
Zoom Security Team
